# Project Standards

## Files matching `frontend/**/*.{ts,vue,astro}`

<!-- Source: local .apm/instructions/frontend.instructions.md -->

## Frontend Standards

- Astro 5 SSR with Vue 3 interactive islands
- Tailwind 4 for styling via Vite plugin
- reka-ui for accessible component primitives
- CVA for component variant management
- Better Auth for authentication (session cookies, middleware-protected routes)
- Drizzle ORM for database access (Postgres)
- Vitest for testing
